PHYS830 Topics in Theoretical Condensed Matter Physics (3 Credits) A variety of current advanced topics in condensed matter theory will be treated in a tutorial format. Students should be familiar with concepts such as renormilization group theory, phase transitions, quantum information, and topological concepts.
